records.question: Which EPs by frogs flipping the fuck out have no offense as their group name, a group ID of 73243639, were released in 2016 or earlier, and have been snatched at most 8 times?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT torrents.id FROM torrents
WHERE torrents.releasetype = 'ep' AND torrents.totalsnatched <= 8 AND torrents.groupid = 73243639 AND torrents.groupyear <= 2016 AND torrents.groupname = 'no offense' AND torrents.artist = 'frogs flipping the fuck out'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT torrents.id
FROM torrents
WHERE artist = 'frogs flipping the fuck out'
  AND groupName = 'no offense'
  AND groupId = 73243639
  AND releaseType = 'EP'
  AND groupYear <= 2016
  AND totalSnatched <= 8
